title: JackOLanternSnowGolem
description: This mod adds another variant of the snow golem that shoots fire instead of snow!
body:
![The Title of the mod:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bc800f1c58bf27027861b7c29f76417c3f6eef7.png)
**!WARNING!** This is an MCreator mod ⚠️

As mentioned before, this simple mod adds a variant of the snow golem. This "useful" variant (otherwise known as the Jack O Lantern snow golem) will shoot fireballs instead of snowballs that will set targets on fire! It can be summoned by placing 2 blocks of snow and then a Jack O lantern ontop. Instead of shearing it, you will be able to take the torch out of the Jack O lantern to turn it into a regular snow golem (but be warned, he will lose his fire attacks!):

![JackOLanternSnowGolem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8be765a89684e13abd8606ef1e90e558a7f2548.png)
Improvements being added:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- ~~Refreshed mod page~~
- Reworked texture and animations
- Improved fire ball
- Left click only without item in hand
- Glows in the dark
- Configs
- Bug fixes
- Dyeable?

</details>
